queue_item.action: Require cryptographic DSSE verification bound to exact payload bytes and trusted signer identity before provenance evidence promotion.
required_evidence: explicit claim boundary and falsification route

progress.finding: Structural attestation validation and trusted-builder policy do not substitute for cryptographic signature verification over DSSE PAE bytes.
progress.verification: Source and tests committed; execution not observed.
progress.handoff: Cloudflare and Vercel evidence workflows should run a real cryptographic verifier, normalize only its exact payload-bound output into this contract, and require contract acceptance before trusted-builder policy or evidence promotion.

shared_queue_policy: Additive owned update only; operations/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json was not overwritten.
next_action: Wire a real Sigstore/cosign or equivalent verifier into CI, execute the six tests, retain raw verifier output and test logs, then compose cryptographic acceptance with R-004 trusted-builder policy and claim-level evidence gates.
